terms.name: 2 Bedroom
terms.description:
Discover the perfect base for a romantic getaway or small family vacation in beautiful Blue Ridge with one of our luxurious 2-bedroom cabins. Relax in the handsome interiors of single level hideaways with modern luxuries and world-class comfort. These purposefully designed cabins offer comfort, privacy, and upscale amenities, making them ideal for a cozy stay.

Secluded & Scenic Cabins in North Georgia

Whether you’re looking for a cozy riverfront cabin or a secluded valley retreat, our 2-bedroom options feature everything you need—fully equipped kitchens, outdoor fire pits, games, and high-speed internet.

With space to sleep up to 4–6 guests, these luxury rentals are perfect for long weekends, anniversary trips, or small family getaways. Spend time outdoors enjoying the water frontage, fishing, and stargazing.

Browse our collection of 2-bedroom Blue Ridge cabin rentals and find the perfect mountain hideaway for your next North Georgia escape.

terms.name: 3 Bedroom
terms.description:
Spacious, comfortable, and ideal for families or couples, our 3-bedroom cabins in Blue Ridge, GA offer all the amenities and space you need to enjoy each other's company without sacrificing personal space. Whether you're traveling with extended family, multiple couples, or your friend group, these cabins provide just the right amount of space to relax and reconnect in the heart of the North Georgia mountains.

Relax in handsome interiors of spacious 3 bedroom cabins offering a private bedroom/ensuite bath on each level.

Cabins with Hot Tubs, Game Rooms, and Scenic Views

From porches with panoramic views and outdoor fireplaces to game rooms and hot tubs, each 3-bedroom cabin is thoughtfully designed to create an unforgettable getaway. Enjoy nearby access to hiking trails, fishing spots, downtown Blue Ridge, and more—then return to a cozy, private retreat that feels like home.

Whether you're celebrating a special occasion or just looking to get away, explore our collection of 3-bedroom cabin rentals in Blue Ridge and find your perfect North Georgia escape.

terms.name: 4 Bedroom
terms.description:
Ideal for multiple families, couples, or small retreats, our 4-bedroom cabins in Blue Ridge, GA offer the space and comfort you need to completely relax on your mountain getaway. With room to sleep 8 to 10 guests, these cabins are perfect for gathering together while still offering plenty of privacy and room to spread out.

Luxury Amenities in a 4-Bedroom Blue Ridge Cabin

Enjoy long-range mountain views, hot tubs, game rooms, gourmet kitchens, and wrap-around decks—all thoughtfully designed to help you maximize your North Georgia vacation. Located just minutes from the best activities of the area, our 4-bedroom cabins give you access to a perfect Blue Ridge experience, from hiking and fishing to downtown dining and shopping.

Browse our selection of 4-bedroom cabin rentals in Blue Ridge and find the perfect home base for your next adventure!

terms.name: 5 Bedroom
terms.description:
Cabin Rentals of Georgia offers luxurious 5-bedroom cabins in Blue Ridge, GA that offer river views and access and layered Blue Ridge mountain views. All of our 5-bedroom luxury cabin rentals are just 15-20 minutes from all the shopping, dining, outdoor activities, and events that North Georgia offers. 

Spacious 5-Bedroom Cabin Rentals in Blue Ridge

Whether you’re planning a multi-family getaway, a couples' celebration, or a corporate retreat, our 5-bedroom cabins to rent in Blue Ridge boast the space you need to bring everyone together under one roof. With room to sleep 10 to 12 guests, these large luxury cabins provide the perfect blend of privacy, gathering areas, and family-friendly amenities.

Enjoy wide-open living areas with soaring ceilings, fully equipped kitchens, spacious decks with mountain and/or river views, and thoughtful extras like game rooms, hot tubs, and outdoor fireplaces. The majority of our 5-bedroom cabins also include ensuite bathrooms for added privacy—ideal for groups of couples or extended families.

Best Cabins in Georgia for Large Groups

If you have a family reunion or corporate retreat, we offer two identical 5-bedroom nearby Blue Ridge cabins to give guests easy access to each other. They have the same floor plan and offer 5 bedrooms with private ensuite bathrooms. Close to the Toccoa River, these luxury cabins provide outdoor fun at the river's edge with river access, picnic tables, and fire pits. For additional space, we have another 5-bedroom just 1/4 mile down the way. 

Each of our 5-bedroom luxury lodges are in close proximity to a collection of luxury cabins giving everyone in your group easy access to each other as well as exciting North Georgia adventures nearby.

terms.name: Blue Ridge Luxury
terms.description:
Luxury Cabin Rentals Near Atlanta ~ the Perfect Georgia Mountain Getaway

Escape the hustle of Atlanta with a short drive to the North Georgia Mountains where luxurious cabin rentals await just 90 minutes away. Cabin Rentals of Georgia offers a range of high-end cabins that serve as your perfect mountain retreat, ideal for rejuvenation and adventure in a serene, scenic environment. 

Luxury Blue Ridge Cabin Rentals 

Our luxury Blue Ridge cabin rentals bring you the best of rustic elegance and modern comfort. Each cabin is thoughtfully designed, featuring refined wood architecture, plush furnishings, and high-end linens that create a cozy yet sophisticated atmosphere. These cabins are crafted to help you unwind, offering a luxurious escape from the pace of city life. Experience the allure of mountain lodges with a hint of rustic charm that invites you to relax, recharge, and reconnect.

The Best Georgia Mountain Luxury Cabins

At Cabin Rentals of Georgia, we offer more than just a place to stay; we provide a luxury experience. Choose from a selection of privately-owned, meticulously appointed cabins that feature breathtaking views of the North Georgia Mountains, Lake Blue Ridge, Toccoa River, and secluded forest settings. Welcome to your unforgettable escape to Blue Ridge Mountain luxury.

terms.name: Family Reunion
terms.description:
Planning a large family reunion in Blue Ridge, GA can be daunting, but Cabin Rentals of Georgia is here to help! Just 90 miles north of Atlanta, GA and a day's drive of the eastern half of the United States, Blue Ridge, GA is the perfect location for your gathering with several 5-bedroom lodges next to each other along the Toccoa River.

Cabin Rentals of Georgia offers some amazing options for Blue Ridge vacation rentals for your family reunion. Given the variety of things to do in Blue Ridge, GA and the surrounding area, young or old, adventurous or not-so, you will create memories to last forever. 

Family Reunion Activities in Blue Ridge, GA

Historic Downtown Blue Ridge is located just under 15 minutes away from these upscale Georgia cabin rentals for large groups. Because of this, it's easy for your group to enjoy all that the area has to offer. While some of your family may bond over fly-fishing, golfing, zip-lining, whitewater rafting on the Ocoee River nearby, or tubing down the Toccoa River, others may enjoy exploring the boutiques along Main Street in Downtown Blue Ridge. Everyone will love exploring the nearby hiking trails, waterfalls, or boating on Lake Blue Ridge. 

With the ability to house ~40 guests depending on the location, you can be sure that your Blue Ridge, GA family reunion will be fun-filled and memorable.  

CABIN RENTALS ON THE TOCCOA RIVER:

Sleeps up to 51 Guests
5 Cabins


*Shown here are Riverview Lodge (top left cabin) and Fallen Timber Lodge (bottom left) closer to river 

Cabin Rentals of Georgia offers several luxury cabins in close proximity to each other so that being together doesn't mean spending a lot of time in the car driving from one locale to another. Our most popular location for Blue Ridge family reunions is in a private subdivision along the Toccoa River.

From these luxury properties, you can tube and kayak right from the property for a two-hour float into McCaysville, which is a short 10 minute drive for the pick up. Fishing for trophy trout and brown trout is an exciting experience for those fishermen in your group. In fact, we have partnered with North GA Trout Fishing for amazing guided fly-fishing experiences. Afterwards, enjoy firepits along the river for s'mores and hotdogs. The big waters of the Toccoa River provide endless opportunities for adventurous fun and memory-making that will stay with you forever.

The following 4 cabins are all close together ~ all homes sleep a total of 43 guests:

  • Fallen Timber Lodge - 5 bedroom/5.5 bath - sleeps 12; located the next driveway over from Riverview Lodge 
  • Riverview Lodge - 5 bedroom/5.5 bath - sleeps 11; located in the adjacent driveway to Fallen Timber Lodge
  • The River's Edge - 5 bedroom/3.5 bath - sleeps 10; located ~1/4 mile from Fallen Timber Lodge and Riverview Lodge
  • Chase Mountain Dreams - 4 bedroom/3 bath - sleeps 10; located in between The Rivers Edge and Fallen Timber Lodge/Riverview Lodge

The following cabin is 1.5 miles away:

  • High Hopes - 4 bedroom/4.5 bath - sleeps 8

SIDE BY SIDE BLUE RIDGE CABINS:
Sleeps up to 14 Guests
2 Cabins 

For smaller family gatherings, we have side-by-side luxury cabins in the Aska Adventure Area that provide many exciting options for all the members of your group. Along Aska Road you will find hiking trails, family fun activities, tube and kayak outfitters for the Toccoa River that runs along Aska Road.

Located in a private area, Serendipity on Noontootla Creek and Cherokee Sunrise on Noontootla Creek are nestled side by side in the Aska Area. With a private pond at Cherokee Sunrise and a communal "Treehouse" area at Serendipity, there is much fun to be had at these luxury Blue Ridge cabin rentals. Enjoy evenings by the creekside fire pit and mornings spent on the plentiful decks enjoying the views. 

  • Serendipity on Noontootla Creek - 5 bedroom/5.5 bath - sleeps 10; all paved roads, located next to Cherokee Sunrise on Noontootla Creek
  • Cherokee Sunrise on Noontootla Creek - 2 bedroom/2 bath - sleeps 4; located next door to Serendipity on Noontootla Creek.

Kid-Friendly Activities in the Aska Adventure Area

The Lilly Pad Village offers family fun including fishing in a large pond and gem mining. The Toccoa Riverside Restaurant is centrally located in the Aska Adventure Area and perfect for enjoying a hearty meals amidst the mountain scenery.

For tubing along the Toccoa River, Tocca Valley Campground (home of the iconic pink tubes) is located just a few minutes from these two properties! 

North GA Fly Fishing

For the fishermen in your group, check out our fly-fishing guides who will provide the most exhilarating time on the Toccoa River landing huge trophy rainbow trout and brown trout. Intimately acquainted with all the sweet spots along the Toccoa River and Noontootla Creek, you are guaranteed the time of your life with these awesome guides. 

Additional Cabins Along Aska Road

In case your family reunion needs additional space at this grouping, check out our cabins located on Aska Road! Just 10-15 minutes from Serendipity and Cherokee Sunrise, these properties are the perfect haven for your family and friends to be situated nearby. 

  • Blue Ridge Lake Sanctuary - 3 bedroom/3.5 bath - sleeps 6
  • Above the Timberline - 4 bedroom/3.5 bath - sleeps 8
  • Aska Escape Lodge - 3 bedroom/3 bath - sleeps 6

Planning large group retreats and reunions in Blue Ridge, GA has never been easier! For assistance in planning, call our Cabin Rentals of Georgia's Vacation Planning Experts at 706-432-2140 so we can help your planning go as smoothly as possible.

terms.name: Corporate Retreats
terms.description:
Blue Ridge, GA is the optimal location to host your North Georgia corporate retreat or business event as it is just a short 100 mile drive due north of Atlanta. Offering large cabin rentals with ensuite bath, planning corporate retreats in Blue Ridge, GA has never been easier than with Cabin Rentals of Georgia. Experience our unique settings and luxury lodges ideal for corporate events! 

Through the years, we have had the pleasure of hosting many a successful business and church retreats in our luxury cabin rentals. Here are just a few of the notable companies that we have hosted:

  • Loews Hotel
  • Lululemon
  • Brassfield & Gorrie
  • Gathering the Kings
  • The Atlanta Women's Foundation
  • New Hope Ministries
  • Weingarten Realty Investors (now Kimco Realty)
  • The Friendship Circle of Atlanta

Our large Blue Ridge cabins situated close together are perfect for business retreats offering private bedrooms with ensuite baths, perfect for team building, exploration, exhilaration, and wellness. Read our suggested guide to planning a corporate retreat here! 

Escaping the hustle and bustle of the frenetic city vibe to a peaceful, scenic mountain retreat will ensure that you and your team will come away feeling refreshed, revived, and reenergized to tackle your company's largest hurdles with great success. Boasting high-speed Wifi, you can stay connected at our luxury cabins rentals while hosting workshops for your team. 

Blue Ridge GA Team Building Activities

Known for its rich variety of activities, Blue Ridge is full of options to let loose during your free time! Let these ideas serve as a springboard for the most productive and memorable corporate retreat:

  • Hiking the Appalachian Trail and Benton-McKaye Trail
  • Whitewater Rafting the Ocoee River
  • Guided Fly-Fishing with our partner: North GA Trout Fishing
  • Team Bonding Attractions ~ Escape Rooms, Mini Golf, Paintball
  • Boating on Lake Blue Ridge

TOCCOA RIVER CORPORATE RETREAT CABIN RENTALS: 


Riverview Lodge (top left) and Fallen Timber Lodge (bottom center)

22 Beds Total/16 Full Baths Total

Located just 15 minutes from downtown Blue Ridge, this group of luxury cabin rentals is the all-star pick for your next corporate retreat. Boasting King and Queen suite bedrooms, high-speed Wifi, and close proximity to one another, treat your team to a getaway they will not forget. Boost team retention while bonding in such a scenic area. 

  • Fallen Timber Lodge - 5 bedroom/5.5 bath - sleeps 12 - 7 beds; located the next driveway over from Riverview Lodge
  • Riverview Lodge - 5 bedroom/5.5 bath - sleeps 11 - 5 beds + futon; located the next driveway over from Fallen Timber Lodge
  • The River's Edge - 5 bedroom/3.5 bath - sleeps 10 - 5 beds; located ~1/4 mile from Fallen Timber Lodge in same subdivision
  • Chase Mountain Dreams - 4 bedroom/3 bath - sleeps 10 - 5 beds; located in between The Rivers Edge and Fallen Timber Lodge/Riverview Lodge

LOCATED 1.5 MILE AWAY FOR ADDITIONAL SPACE:

  • High Hopes - 4 bedroom/4.5 bath - sleeps 8 - 4 beds
     

BLUE RIDGE CABINS SIDE BY SIDE:
Sleeps up to 14 Guests

For another option for your work vacation, take a look at two of our Aska Adventure Area cabins located side-by-side! Located incredibly close to some of the region's best hiking trails and waterfalls, immerse yourself in the epitome of nature at these two properties. 

Enjoy access to the Noontootla Creek, where our partnered fly fishing guides will help you land trophy rainbow trout and brown trout in these prized waters. 

  • Serendipity on Noontootla Creek - 5 bedroom/5.5 bath - sleeps 10 - 5 beds; all paved roads
  • Cherokee Sunrise on Noontootla Creek - 2 bedroom/2 bath - sleeps 4 - 3 beds; located next door to Serendipity on Noontootla Creek
     

Corporate Retreat Testimonials:

"I cannot recommend this company and these cabins enough. We rented four cabins for a 3 day work retreat and everything was PERFECT. The views, the space, the decor -- all of it. When I arrived to what we'd determined would be our 'main cabin' for the weekend, Gary (owner) was one step ahead, getting a fire started for us inside. Throughout our stay, he checked on us regularly, ensuring we were happy campers. The cabins themselves are magnificent, but the service is not to be understated either. Such a wonderful experience all the way around. I miss it already!"  ~ Fallen Timber Lodge

"Our agency rented this home for a work retreat. The pictures do not do justice to how incredibly beautiful this home is! As soon as you walk in the door, you are in awe of the quality and beauty of the home. We were greeted with music playing and the air turned on so that we would be comfortable as soon as we stepped into the home! The kitchen is state of the art with everything you will need to cook any type of dinner. The bedrooms were very welcoming with samples of soap and other goodies placed on the bed with extra fluffy towels. All three floors offered opportunities for relaxing! There is a sun porch that called us to take time to relax and enjoy the view! The outdoor fireplace was a great gathering place at night to reflect on our thoughts for the day and to gaze at the stars. I highly recommend this house! The price is excellent for such a quality home. We are very thankful to have had such a beautiful, restful setting for our retreat and plan on returning next year!" ~ Serendipity on Noontootla Creek

When it comes to business, our North Georgia corporate retreat rentals invigorate groups' agendas and provide the perfect environment for team building activities that will be sure to strengthen bonds of business associates.

terms.name: Pet Friendly
terms.description:
Planning your North Georgia mountain vacation to Blue Ridge, GA is an exciting experience especially when you can bring your beloved furry animal!

Pet Friendly Cabins in Blue Ridge, GA

Many of our luxury cabin rentals are dog-friendly so that your pet can enjoy tranquility and comfort too. Take a look at our beautiful luxury cabins to find the perfect one that will be your home away from home while in beautiful Blue Ridge!

Explore the few luxurious cabin rental options that are deemed pet friendly and know that you won't have to leave your family pet behind.  Please know that just because a cabin is pet friendly ~ this does not mean that pets are free of charge. ALL dogs must be approved by management, even if the cabin is pet friendly. 

Things To Do with Your Pet in North GA

The town of Blue Ridge, GA is very pet friendly, with many restaurants and wineries welcoming your pet. Your pet can enjoy lots of exercise in one of our dog parks, on the hiking trails that abound in the North Georgia Mountains, and cool off in our streams and rivers. Browse just a few of the pet-friendly activites here!

terms.name: Mountain View
terms.description:
Visiting Blue Ridge, Georgia would not be complete without staying in a luxury cabin rental with mountain views! Watching the sun rise over the mountains with a hot cup of coffee or taking in the sunset with a glass of wine are some of the fondest memories made by our guests.  

No matter the season, Blue Ridge’s mountain views never disappoint. Spring brings revitalizing greens, summer offers the most vibrant sunsets, and autumn’s fiery reds and oranges transform the mountains into a breathtaking masterpiece. Even in winter, with the trees bare, the long-range views stretch endlessly, revealing a strong and quiet beauty.

Best Mountain View Cabins for a Blue Ridge Getaway

Our luxury cabins with breathtaking mountain views are perfect for your romantic getaway, a family vacation, or a girls' trip. Every day brings a unique view to refresh and rejuvenate your spirit. Spend evenings watching the stars twinkle above the mountain ranges while soaking your cares away in the hot tub. Will you answer the magical call of the Blue Ridge mountains?

terms.name: River Front
terms.description:
Looking for a Blue Ridge cabin along the river? We offer a variety of riverfront, creekfront, and river view cabins along the Toccoa River, Fightingtown Creek, and Noontootla Creek that feature hot tubs, fire pits, game rooms, and spacious outdoor areas. Immerse yourself in the natural beauty of the North Georgia Mountains and enjoy activities like fishing, kayaking, and tubing which are easily accessible from these luxury cabin rentals.

Georgia Fishing Cabins

Enjoy just being steps away from the rushing water of the Blue Ridge Mountains. Cast a line from the backyard of your Blue Ridge cabin by the water year-round. In the summer, cool off in the refreshing water and enjoy a beautiful backdrop to your North Georgia vacation.

terms.name: River View
terms.description:
When choosing a river view or creekfront luxury cabin in Blue Ridge, GA, many factors play into your decision. With several of our luxury cabins, one finds a setting where the beauty of river views meets the mountainous scenery without sacrificing the many amenities that set your getaway up for success. Luxury North Georgia cabin rentals are what we specialize in, and river scenes play a big part in the palette of Blue Ridge mountain settings. 

Blue Ridge Cabin Rentals With Fishing Access 

The Toccoa River is one of ~48 rivers in the USA that flow north, and its calm, welcoming waters is the perfect setting for trophy trout fishing, tubing/kayaking, and whitewater rafting where it turns into the Ocoee River. Enjoy spacious outdoor living spaces with fireplaces and feel the cares of the world slip away. Time will certainly fly by as the river constantly flows forward. 

The Noontootla Creek and Fightingtown Creek offer a slower pace for your waterfront getaways without sacrificing the opportunities for outdoor adventures. Enjoy casting a line in these quiet waters or reading a book by the banks. 

The ability to gaze upon a river from your luxury Georgia riverfront cabin is a special amenity we have the privilege of offering our guests who crave the restorative qualities a river can provide.

terms.name: Lake View
terms.description:
Some of the most highly sought after luxury lake view cabin rentals are those idyllically located on Lake Blue Ridge. Featuring spectacular views of the emerald green waters, rolling mountains, and vibrant sunsets, our guests find the rejuvenation and relaxation they seek when escaping the city. 

Lake Blue Ridge Cabin Rentals

Enter a world of beauty and luxury in a relaxed atmosphere that inspires the total restoration of the soul. In this perfect place, you will enjoy all the lake and mountain activities the North Georgia Mountains have to offer. For us, it's all about creating the total mountain experience while staying in a North Georgia lake cabin rental that can fit every budget.

Lake Blue Ridge Activities 

When staying a luxury cabin rental just steps away from the pristine banks of this man-made lake, a myriad of activities await you. Rent a pontoon boat and explore the many private coves, enjoy kayaking or paddleboarding on the quiet waters, cast a line for a variety of fish, soak up some sun while at Morganton Point, or enjoy a walk around the Lake Loop Trail.

terms.name: Cabin In The Woods
terms.description:
Luxury Wooded Cabins in Blue Ridge, GA

Escape the hustle and bustle of everyday life and retreat to the tranquility of Blue Ridge, Georgia. Immerse yourself in the serenity of nature with a vacation in one of our luxury Georgia cabins, where relaxation and adventure blend seamlessly. Whether you’re seeking a romantic getaway, a family retreat, or a budget-friendly stay, our Georgia mountain cabins offer the perfect setting to reconnect with nature and yourself.

Picture yourself in a cozy log cabin in the woods—offering outdoor fire pits, game rooms, and all the modern luxuries you desire. Our cabins are thoughtfully designed to combine rustic charm with contemporary comforts, ensuring that your stay is both peaceful and indulgent.

Secluded Cabin Rentals in Blue Ridge, Georgia

While some cabins are nestled in very safe and secluded wooded settings, others boast stunning mountain views or soothing babbling creeks, offering the best of both worlds. Surrounded by lush forests, you’ll find the privacy you crave and the beauty of nature right at your doorstep. Come and discover the magic of staying in a cabin in the woods—where every sunrise, every trail, and every moment brings you closer to the serenity you're craving.

terms.name: Toccoa River Luxury Cabin Rentals
terms.description:
Just 90 miles north of Atlanta, GA you will discover a beautifully secluded place along the tailwaters of Toccoa River in Blue Ridge, GA which features luxury cabin rentals for your family or large group, providing the ultimate North GA mountain getaway.

While some lodges are perched on a ridge providing breathtaking panoramic mountain and river views, other lodges are located closer to the Toccoa River providing a more active experience with river access. 

Toccoa River Cabins for Large Groups in North Georgia

Popular for business retreats, church retreats, and family reunions, these lodges are centrally located to provide all the outdoor adventure you like with the advantage of being just 10 miles from Downtown Blue Ridge or less than 5 miles from McCaysville, GA/Copperhill, TN. 

Outdoor Activities in Blue Ridge, GA

To enjoy the outdoors, these luxury Blue Ridge cabins are privately situated in a secluded subdivision offering easy roads for walking and exploring. During the summer months, bring some tubes and put in at your cabin where you'll experience a two-hour float northward into McCaysville. Pick-up is usually at Horseshoe Bend Park which is a large park with volleyball, a beach area, and a parking lot for outdoor enthusiasts.

For the fishermen in your group, cast a line just steps away from your luxury riverfront cabin rental and catch trophy-sized rainbow trout and brown trout! For a guided experience, check out some of the expert fly-fishing guides in the area.

terms.name: Motorcycle Friendly
terms.description:
Ride into the North Georgia Mountains and experience the ultimate getaway at our motorcycle-friendly cabin rentals in Blue Ridge, GA. Let our cabin rentals with paved access be the home base for your scenic drives through the winding mountains. 

Ride the Best Motorcycle Routes in North Georgia

Blue Ridge is a biker's playground. Straight from your cabin door, you can head out on:

  • GA Highway 60 – Curves, elevation changes, and breathtaking overlooks.
  • Tail of the Dragon – Just a short ride away for the ultimate challenge.
  • Scenic drives to Dahlonega, Helen, and the Ocoee River Gorge.

Browse more scenic drives here to inspire your getaway. 

Blue Ridge Cabin Rentals with Paved Access

Our motorcycle-friendly cabins in North Georgia offer everything you need for the perfect getaway. At the end of an exhilirating ride, enjoy a soak in the hot tub or a friendly game of billiards to unwind. Your journey begins and ends at our luxury Blue Ridge vacation rentals. Reserve online or over the phone today!

terms.name: Pet-Friendly
terms.description:
Our pets are part of the family, and we at Cabin Rentals of Georgia make it easy for you to travel with your pets. We have several pet friendly cabins in Blue Ridge, GA! Some cabins have a weight limit and others do allow larger dogs. We take great pride in the pristine condition in which our cabins are presented to our guests and maintained for our homeowners, and so all pets are subject to approval prior to reserving. 

Downtown Blue Ridge is very pet friendly! As you stroll down Main Street, many shopkeepers keep a bowl of water outside their shop for thirsty dogs. Even several restaurants allow dogs to be a part of the family as you dine alfresco. With so many things to do in Blue Ridge, like hiking the many trail systems, enjoying waterfall hikes, streams, rivers, and lakes, your dog can be a part of the family fun wherever you go. Take a look at our guide to a pet-friendly vacation!

terms.name: High Speed Internet
terms.description:
Stay connected while enjoying the beauty of Blue Ridge with our luxury cabins featuring high-speed internet. Whether you’re working remotely, streaming your favorite shows, or staying in touch with loved ones, our WiFi-equipped cabins ensure seamless connectivity without sacrificing the peacefulness of the mountains.

Remote Work-Friendly Cabin Rentals in Blue Ridge

Perfect for remote workers, our Blue Ridge cabins with WiFi allow you to balance work and relaxation. Enjoy breathtaking views, cozy fireplaces, and outdoor activities while staying productive with fast and reliable internet access.

Browse our collection of high-speed internet cabins in Blue Ridge and experience the best of both worlds—modern convenience in a scenic mountain retreat.

terms.name: Game Room
terms.description:
In planning a cabin trip to Blue Ridge, GA, you want to make sure your luxury cabin rental has all the amenities you anticipate for family fun and games. 

Family-Friendly Vacation Rentals in Blue Ridge

Though the North Georgia Mountains provide the perfect outdoor playground for hiking, horseback riding, waterfall hikes, along with lake and river activities, there is nothing more fun than to challenge your friends to a game of pool, foosball, corn hole, ping pong, or board games. 

Most of our Blue Ridge cabins offer spectacular game rooms for your enjoyment. Browse our boutique inventory of luxury cabin lodging and find the perfect game room for your group!

terms.name: Hot Tub
terms.description:
Finding the perfect Blue Ridge cabin with a hot tub while planning your cabin trip to Georgia is effortless with Cabin Rentals of Georgia. Offering North Georgia cabin rentals with hot tubs, our luxury properties also include beautiful North GA mountain views, intimate wooded views, beautiful river views, and intimate spaces in front of wood-burning fireplaces.

Secluded Cabins with a Hot Tub for the Ultimate Relaxation

Escaping to Blue Ridge is to find yourself a million miles away from the stresses of everyday life and soothe your cares away in a beautiful mountain cabin hot tub. All of our hot tubs are drained and cleaned between each rental, so you can enjoy a relaxing soak confident of its cleanliness. Browse through our boutique inventory of Blue Ridge cabins with hot tubs and find the perfect luxury mountain cabin rental for you.

terms.name: Billiard Table
terms.description:
Add a touch of fun competition to your Blue Ridge getaway with our luxury cabins featuring billiard tables. Whether you’re enjoying a family vacation, a corporate retreat, or a couples’ escape, a game of pool in your private cabin is the perfect way to unwind after a day of exploring the North Georgia Mountains.

Cabins with Pool Tables for Endless Fun

Our Blue Ridge cabins with pool tables offer more than just entertainment—they feature spacious game rooms, cozy fireplaces, hot tubs, and stunning mountain views for the ultimate vacation experience. Relax on the deck after a game with a drink in hand as you revel in the breathtaking views.

Book your stay in one of our game room cabins with a billiard table and enjoy a perfect mix of luxury, recreation, and relaxation in the heart of the Blue Ridge Mountains!

terms.name: Coffee Pot
terms.description:
Start your day in Blue Ridge, GA with a freshly brewed cup of coffee in your luxury cabin. Whether you prefer the convenience of a Keurig coffee pot or the rich aroma of a classic drip coffee maker, every one of our cabins is equipped to help you enjoy your perfect morning routine.

Brew & Relax: Blue Ridge Cabins with Cozy Coffee Stations

Sip your coffee while watching the sunrise from a private deck, cozying up by the fireplace, or preparing for a day of exploring the area. All of our cabins boasts some sort of coffee maker and offer the perfect blend of modern convenience and rustic charm. This ensures a relaxing and enjoyable stay.

terms.name: Gas Grill
terms.description:
Enjoy the ultimate Blue Ridge getaway with a luxury cabin featuring a gas grill, perfect for preparing memorable meals with family and friends. Preparing a BBQ feast or simply savor a meal surrounded by nature; our cabins with gas grills provide the perfect setting for outdoor dining and entertaining.

Host the Perfect Cookout at Your Blue Ridge Cabin Rental

Each of our luxury Blue Ridge cabins offers fully equipped kitchens, gas grills (propane provided), spacious decks, and breathtaking views, allowing you to cook and dine in complete comfort. After a day of hiking, fishing, or shopping, fire up the gas grill and enjoy an unforgettable evening under the stars.

Browse our selection of cabins with gas grills in Blue Ridge, GA, and elevate your mountain retreat with delicious outdoor meals!

terms.name: Outdoor Fireplaces
terms.description:
There’s something truly special about gathering around a crackling outdoor fireplace in the heart of the Blue Ridge Mountains. Creating the perfect setting to relax, connect, and enjoy the fresh mountain air, the heart of an outdoor living space is the fireplace you center around. 

Cabins with Outdoor Fireplaces for the Ultimate Escape

Our Blue Ridge luxury cabins with outdoor fireplaces boast plenty of space to spread out and enjoy the outdoors. From covered porches with stone wood-burning fireplaces to spacious yards with fire pits, you’ll find the perfect place to unwind with a glass of wine, roast marshmallows, and share stories by the fire. Pair a roaring fire with stunning mountain views, riverfront ambience, or the seclusion of the woods, and you’ll have an unforgettable Blue Ridge experience.

No matter your reason for visiting North Georgia, an outdoor fireplace adds warmth, charm, and an inviting atmosphere to your mountain getaway. Browse our collection of Blue Ridge cabins with outdoor fireplaces and start planning your perfect stay!

terms.name: Indoor Fireplaces
terms.description:
Nothing sets the mood for a cozy Blue Ridge mountain getaway like a crackling fire indoors. Whether you prefer the traditional charm of a wood-burning fireplace or the convenience of a gas fireplace, our Blue Ridge cabins offer the perfect ambience for relaxing evenings and memorable moments.

Gather in a spacious living area with floor-to-ceiling stone fireplaces, unwind with a cup of coffee on a chilly morning, or enjoy a glass of wine as the fire envelops you in its warm embrace. After a day of exploring the best of Blue Ridge's things to do, there’s nothing better than returning to your cabin and settling in by the fire.

Romantic & Family-Friendly Cabins with Indoor Fireplaces

From romantic getaways to family vacations, our cabins with indoor fireplaces provide warmth, comfort, and a welcoming atmosphere. Browse our collection of Blue Ridge cabins with fireplaces and find the perfect retreat for your next mountain escape.

terms.name: Non-Smoking
terms.description:
We are proud that all of our luxury cabins are non-smoking, ensuring that you can enjoy a fresh and clean Blue Ridge retreat. Every cabin in our collection is 100% smoke-free, ensuring a comfortable and healthy environment for all guests. Whether you're planning a family reunion, a romantic getaway, or a corporate retreat, you can relax knowing that your cabin is free from smoke and unwanted odors.

Family-Friendly & Smoke-Free Cabin Rentals in North Georgia

Breathe in the crisp North Georgia air as you relax on a private deck with stunning views, cozy up by the fireplace, or explore the outdoor adventures that Blue Ridge has to offer. Our luxury non-smoking cabins feature spacious living areas, gourmet kitchens, and top-tier amenities, allowing you to enjoy every moment of your stay in total comfort.

Browse our collection of non-smoking cabin rentals in Blue Ridge and experience the perfect blend of clean air, luxury, and relaxation in the mountains.

terms.name: Winter
terms.description:
Winter in Blue Ridge, GA

When the peak seasons fade and the crowds disperse, a peaceful transformation settles over the North Georgia Mountains. Winter in Blue Ridge is a time of frosty mornings, expansive long-range mountain views, and the renewing warmth of a roaring fire.

Whether you are planning a romantic winter getaway for two or travelling with friends, Blue Ridge offers a refined pace just two hours north of Atlanta. From the boutique shops of Downtown to the seclusion of a Blue Ridge luxury cabin rental, discover why the colder months are North Georgia's best-kept secret.

Your Guide to All Things Winter in North Georgia

Need help packing or looking for a wintry stay? Check out our article, The Ultimate Blue Ridge Winter Travel Guide, offering local tips, weather expectations, and winter cabin recommendations to ensure your trip is seamless.

Things to Do for Couples in Blue Ridge, GA 

Follow our Romantic Guide to Blue Ridge to discover the best restaurants, activities, and luxury cabins for two. From cabins with hot tubs to hidden gems of Blue Ridge, our suggested 5-day itinerary for couples will inspire your next getaway!

Blue Ridge Winter Cabin Amenities

  • Cozy Fireplaces: Every luxury cabin is anchored by a fireplace greeting you on slow mornings and warming you on chilly evenings.
  • Steaming Hot Tubs: Let the stress of the daily routine melt in our cabins with hot tubs. Sit back and stargaze while enjoying the reset you've been putting off for a while. 
  • Mountain Views: Though the trees are bare, winter offers the clearest and most dramatic views of the Blue Ridge mountains. Reserve one of our luxury cabins with mountain views for a front-row seat to this natural beauty.

terms.name: Mountain Biking
terms.description:
The North Georgia Mountains provides beautiful bike trails for bicycling and mountain biking enthusiasts. For thrill-seeking mountain bikers, designated trail systems offering forest canopies, mountain vistas, waterfalls, creeks, and lush flora make for some of the most memorable rides in the nation.

Blue Ridge GA is a biker's heaven, riding the twisty curvy mountain roads with stellar scenery and fresh mountain air. Get outside, get some exercise, and get recharged while experiencing Blue Ridge!

terms.name: Seasonal Activities
terms.description: No matter the season or the weather, there is always something around the corner to explore or experience in Blue Ridge. When the leaves are budding and the mountains come alive with rebirth, scenic drives around the Aska Adventure Area or the Ocoee Whitewater Center showcase the humbling beauty of the mountains. During summer, the deep blue-green water in Lake Blue Ridge is the perfect place to make some waves, whether it be on a pontoon boat, a paddle board, or a jet ski. Blue Ridge celebrates the vibrant foliage and apple season with a variety of fall festivals which means visiting Mercier Orchards or The Swinging Bridge are a couple of the best places to soak in the last few warm days in a luxury cabin while enjoying some fresh apple cider or another treat from the plethora of vendors in downtown Blue Ridge. When nature is hibernating during the winter months, the mountain ranges still share their humbling prowess, Brasstown Bald being a faithful reminder of this. If you want to save hiking for the other seasons, spend your Blue Ridge getaway at one of the spas in the downtown area or at a wine tasting. No matter what you are looking for, the Blue Ridge mountains have an answer.

terms.name: Breweries
terms.description: North GA and the Blue Ridge area is home to some of the freshest brewed pints of beer you have ever tasted. An ever-popular thing to do in Blue Ridge is to go hang out at the local breweries in Blue Ridge or in twin towns of McCaysville, GA/Copperhill, TN and experience the best beer ever. North GA is known for some of the best brewed beer in the region. Browse through our list of the best breweries with their impressive craft beer selection, trendy atmosphere, and of course, close proximity to your Blue Ridge cabin rental!

terms.name: Boating
terms.description:
Lake Blue Ridge and the surrounding area offer fun boating activities on our North Georgia lakes. Whether it's Carter Lake in Ellijay, Lake Blue Ridge in Blue Ridge, Lake Nottely in Blairsville, or Lake Chatuge in Hiawassee, all offer boat rentals for outdoor fun in the sun. In Blue Ridge at Morganton Point where you can rent kayaks, and spend the day peacefully paddling the emerald green waters of Lake Blue Ridge. Public boat ramps are located in various locations - Lake Blue Ridge Marina, Morganton Point, Lakewood, or Dry Branch Rd. off Aska Rd., and other places.

Renting a pontoon boat on Lake Blue Ridge for the day creates a memorable Blue Ridge experience. Take a picnic and enjoy a day out on the lake...anchoring in spots that offer a rope swing, swimming, and enjoying the cool turquoise waters of Lake Blue Ridge.

terms.name: Wineries-Vineyards
terms.description:
While staying in Blue Ridge, GA one of the most popular things to do is to visit the wineries and vineyards. 

The North Georgia mountain landscape is dotted with wineries and vineyards proclaiming its distinction as one of the prominent wine regions of the country. Boasting award-winning wines gaining national recognition and comparable soil composition mimicking the Italian Piedmont, visiting a Georgia winery and vineyard is a popular excursion.

The North GA mountains are unique in providing a perfect escape from the city by the pursuit of outdoor adventures from hiking, fishing, rafting, ziplining, or the indulgence of relaxation and refreshment from luxury cabin rentals, spas, shopping, and tubing. Add to this list of things to do in Blue Ridge ~ a fun day at a winery with friends and family, sitting around a fire pit in the cooler months, sipping fine wine, and enjoying the camaraderie this activity provides.

terms.name: Farmers Markets
terms.description:
During your Blue Ridge GA mountain getaway, be sure to take a Saturday and visit a farmer’s market. North Georgia Mountain farmer’s markets are not to be missed! Stock up on your menu items for memorable tasting meals, eating REAL food, locally grown, chemical-free fruits and vegetables, naturally raised eggs and meats, along with other one-of-a-kind arts, crafts, and souvenirs. Meet the farmers who grow these beautiful crops and know that you are eating healthy, tasty food. 

Some farm venues offer on-site cafe’s that will rival any 5-star restaurant food quality. 7M Family Farms offers an incredible array of fresh produce, seafood, meats, eggs, cheese, and dairy providing both lunch menus and dinner menus. Mercier’s Orchards is a working farm offering a wide variety of produce, as well as select grass-fed beef and pork, cheeses and a huge store of goods. Their cafe is open on select days offering breakfast and lunch.

Mountain Valley Farms is a much-beloved country store offering fresh produce, naturally raised dairy products, grass-fed meats ranging from pork to beef, honey, and kitchen goods. Take the kids so they can pet the farm animals! 

And when you come here, make the most of your Blue Ridge experience and stay in a luxurious cabin in the mountains. Cabin Rentals of Georgia offers the finest vacation cabin rentals; equipped with game rooms, hot tubs, pool tables, flat screen TV's, and outstanding views ensuring that there is something for everyone. Whether you prefer to wake up to the sounds of the Toccoa River at A Rolling River Cabin or enjoy a glass of wine at Fallen Timber Lodge overlooking the river - you will certainly relax and enjoy the serenity of Blue Ridge in any one of the luxury properties of Cabin Rentals of Georgia.

terms.name: Fishing
terms.description:
Blue Ridge, GA, located just 2 hours north of Atlanta, is the Trout Capital of Georgia with over 100 miles of creeks, streams, and rivers. The Toccoa River, flowing through Blue Ridge northward into Tennessee where it becomes the Ocoee River, is the main tributary for plentiful rainbow and brown trout fishing. Noontootla Creek and Fightingtown Creek offer stellar opportunities for trout fishing. Meanwhile, fishing Lake Blue Ridge offers opportunities for catching bass and other fish.

Not sure where to begin? Blue Ridge is home to several professional fishing guides, including Georgia Wild Trout, Joe DiPietro, Noontootla Creek Farms (listed below)! These local experts will guide you along a memorable river experience that will leave you yearning for your next Blue Ridge getaway.

Best North Georgia Fishing Cabins 

Almost half of our luxury Blue Ridge cabin rental portfolio is on or near North Georgia's famed rivers and streams, providing optimal year-round fishing. From private waters on the Noontootla Creek to prime spots on the Toccoa River, our riverfront cabins in Blue Ridge are perfect for your fishing getaway.

terms.name: Golf
terms.description:
Enjoying temperate weather in the North Georgia Mountains, golfing is a year-round experience in Blue Ridge, GA.  

With several golf courses 15-45 minutes away from our luxury cabins, your golf clubs will definitely come in handy on your mountain getaway to Blue Ridge.

Rated Golf Digest's #8 Best New Course in 2020, Old Toccoa Farms boasts 18 holes of gorgeous fairways located along the Toccoa River.

Brasstown Valley Golf Course, located in Blairsville, GA, offers a challenging yet rewarding experience with a warm clubhouse atmosphere at the end of a round.

Enjoy several other golf courses in the area that are sure to please.

Maximize your Blue Ridge experience and book a tee time as soon as you reserve your luxury cabin!

terms.name: Helicopter Tours
terms.description:
Helicopter tours in Blue Ridge, GA, offer an exhilarating way to experience the stunning natural beauty of the Blue Ridge Mountains from above.

These tours provide panoramic views of the area's landscapes, including mountains, lakes, rivers, and local landmarks. Companies like Blue Ridge Helicopter Tours offer various packages, from short 15-minute flights to longer excursions lasting up to an hour, catering to different interests and budgets.

The tours are known for their safety, with experienced pilots who often provide commentary on the sights below.

Custom tours are also available for special occasions like proposals or celebrations.  

The experience is often described as unforgettable, offering a unique perspective on the scenic beauty of North Georgia

terms.name: Hiking
terms.description:
North Georgia Mountain Hiking Trails

The crown jewel of Georgia ~ Blue Ridge's dominant attraction is the myriad of hiking trails that wind through the North Georgia Mountains ~ Over 300 miles of hiking trails in the Blue Ridge area.

Appalachian Trail Begins in Georgia

Finding its roots here close to Blue Ridge GA, the Appalachian Trail begins at Springer Mountain and branches into several accessible hikes in the Blue Ridge area exploring waterfalls, rivers, creeks, stunning mountain vistas, not to mention the beautiful flora and fauna.

Best Hiking Trails in Blue Ridge, GA

Hiking in Blue Ridge  offers something for everyone: easy to advanced terrain to experience, forests to hike through, hidden waterfalls to explore, and mountain ranges to marvel at. To add a treasure hunt aspect to your hike, check out geocaching! Pack a comfortable pair of tennis shoes, weather-appropriate clothing, and a water bottle and explore the beauty of the North GA Mountains

Map of Blue Ridge Hiking Trails and Access Points

Find a comprehensive map of the most popular hiking trails in Blue Ridge GA

terms.name: Horseback Riding
terms.description:
A mountain getaway would not be complete without spending some time in the forest and experiencing a trail ride in Blue Ridge.

Reconnect with nature on your mighty yet friendly steed and explore the hidden paths of the North Georgia Mountains.

Professional guides will take you through the area for an unplugged excursion, leaving you with a changed perspective of the Blue Ridge area.

No matter the reason for your getaway—girls trip, honeymoon, family vacation, etc.—horseback riding is always a great excuse to experience the outdoors!

terms.name: Orchards
terms.description:
With an ambience that appeals to everyone, apple orchards abound in the North Georgia Mountains. Between the three orchards in the Blue Ridge and Ellijay area, there are plenty of opportunities for tasting fresh pies, shopping home goods, enjoying the U-Pick season, and try some fresh apple cider and/or Georgia wine.

Pro tip: pair some of Mercier Orchard's fried apple pies (microwaved for 5-10 seconds) with vanilla ice cream! 

With every holiday comes new and exciting activities for both kids and adults alike!

Experience one of Blue Ridge's tastiest excursions any season you visit!

terms.name: Whitewater Rafting
terms.description: For the adventurous bunch, whitewater rafting in the Tri-State area (Georgia, North Carolina, Tennessee) is a must! The Ocoee Whitewater Center, home to part of the 1996 Atlanta Olympics, is located in the Ocoee River Gorge on Hwy 64. The Ocoee River winds its way through the area, beginning in McCaysville, GA, and its rapids range from Class I to Class IV. Whether you want to experience the Middle Ocoee (better for beginniners) or the Upper Ocoee (more advanced rapids), these whitewater rafting companies have you in good hands. Make your Blue Ridge experience unforgettable with a whitewater rafting trip! Perfect for teenagers and above, this outdoor excursion will leave you with an adrenaline high that will stick with you. Take advantage of the adventure awaiting you and reserve your whitewater rafting trip today with one of the following companies!

terms.name: Scenic Drives
terms.description:
Because Blue Ridge, GA is centrally located to all the cool sites in the North GA Mountains, scenic drives are a breeze and will not take up your whole day. Experience breathtaking mountain vistas, green valleys, North GA Mountain lakes, rushing rivers and beautiful foliage no matter the time of year.

It's easy to find cool spots for photo opportunities to make the most of your Blue Ridge mountain vacation.

Check out the Fannin Chamber of Commerce for specially planned out scenic drives for your enjoyment.

For motorcylclists, Blue Ridge is the place to stay in our biker-friendly luxury cabin rentals and then explore the North GA Mountains and beyond for awesome day trips.

One of the most popular is the Blood Mountain ride and of course, the historically well-known popular Tail of the Dragon. If you want to stay closer to "home", popular rides are Hwy 60 to Dahlonega, Blairsville to Turner's Corner on Hwy 129, and the Nantahala Gorge in nearby North Carolina.

terms.name: Tubing-Kayaking
terms.description:
Blue Ridge, GA provides scenic opportunities to explore the rivers and lakes in the area, especially during the summer months. Tubing and kayaking are a popular, cool, refreshing activity in Blue Ridge to beat the heat during the long hot days of summer. Our luxury waterfront cabin rentals right on the Toccoa River boast easy access to tubing and kayaking. 

Depending on the location of your Blue Ridge cabin rental, tubing the rivers of the region is easy to do. If you are staying in the upper Toccoa River area along Aska Road, you will find several tubing outfitters. Local favorites are Toccoa Valley Campground with the pink tubes, and a longer float would start at Van Zandt's Grill and Grocery/Tube and Kayak Rentals.

If you are staying in any one of our Toccoa River Luxury Cabin Rentals along the tailwaters of the Toccoa River, it is popular to purchase a tube from WalMart and put in directly from your cabin. Enjoy a 2-hour float into McCaysville and Horseshoe Bend Park. Be sure to leave a vehicle parked in the parking lot or have someone pick you up!

During the summer months, you will see many tubes and kayaks along the waterways in Blue Ridge, and what better way to cool off than frolicking in the cool North Georgia mountain waters!

terms.name: Waterfalls
terms.description:
Along with the extensive hiking trails in the North Georgia Mountains, you will discover breathtakingly beautiful waterfalls as well. Many of these waterfall hikes are family friendly and easy to hike. 

A few of the best waterfalls to explore around Blue Ridge is Fall Branch Falls, located in the Aska Adventure Area near several of our luxury cabins, and is easily accessed off Aska Rd. 

Closer to Ellijay, Amicalola Falls is the third tallest waterfall (729 feet) east of the Missisippi River, and the views will leave you speechless.

Sea Creek Falls is a must see and easy hike even for small kids. Enjoy an easily accessible swimming hole for a bonus!

Helton Creek Falls, located in nearby Vogel State Park, is a gorgeous sight to add to your hiking daytrip, as well as Raven Cliff Falls. Experience Blue Ridge and its gorgeous scenery with the many opportunities to get outside and hike.

terms.name: Zip-Lining
terms.description:
Looking for some mountain adventure activities? Zip-lining through the North Georgia Mountains and forests is a must for your Blue Ridge bucket list!

Soar through the national forests and mountain ranges, and let the exhilaration of the experience take over. Whether you would like to experience the Ocoee Gorge from above, or the mountains and valleys surrounding Blue Ridge, these local zip-lining companies are highly rated and will ensure that you enjoy every moment!

The North GA Mountains are known for its beautiful landscapes, making zip-lining here not just a thrill-seeking activity but also a way to appreciate the natural beauty of the Blue Ridge region.

terms.name: Arts & Entertainment
terms.description:
Arts in Blue Ridge, GA

Blue Ridge, Georgia, is a charming mountain town that has become a vibrant hub for arts and entertainment, attracting both locals and tourists alike. Nestled in the Appalachian Mountains, Blue Ridge offers a unique blend of natural beauty and cultural richness, making it an ideal destination for those seeking both relaxation and cultural enrichment.

Blue Ridge is renowned for its thriving arts scene, with numerous galleries, studios, and artisan shops scattered throughout the town. The Blue Ridge Mountains Arts Association (BRMAA) is at the heart of this scene, hosting art exhibitions, classes, and events that showcase the work of local and regional artists. The Art Center, operated by BRMAA, is a must-visit for art enthusiasts, offering galleries, classrooms, and a gift shop within a historic courthouse.

The town's commitment to the arts is also evident in its public art installations and murals that add vibrant splashes of color and creativity to its streets. Additionally, the Blue Ridge Scenic Railway's Art in the Park event is an annual highlight, where artists display and sell their creations amid the natural beauty of the area.

Blue Ridge GA Entertainment

Blue Ridge's entertainment scene is as diverse as its arts scene. The town boasts a variety of live music venues, from cozy cafes and restaurants featuring local musicians to larger venues hosting regional and national acts. The Blue Ridge Community Theater plays a pivotal role in the town's entertainment, offering a year-round lineup of plays, musicals, and live performances that cater to a wide range of tastes.

Culinary Arts in Blue Ridge

While not traditionally categorized under arts and entertainment, Blue Ridge's culinary scene deserves mention for its contribution to the town's cultural fabric. The town offers a wide array of dining options, from traditional Southern cuisine to international fare, often featuring locally sourced ingredients. Many restaurants also provide live music, further enriching the dining experience.

Blue Ridge, Georgia, offers a rich tapestry of arts and entertainment that reflects the town's cultural diversity and natural beauty. From its vibrant arts scene to its lively entertainment and culinary offerings, Blue Ridge is a destination where art and nature meet, offering something for everyone to enjoy.

terms.name: Attractions
terms.description:
Blue Ridge offers many things to do for the young and old, adventurous and not-so adventurous! Vacationers come back to Blue Ridge year after year, sometimes season after season based on the activities offered. From art festivals and fun outdoor activities to wineries and breweries, Blue Ridge will tug at your heart strings to come back again and again.

The Swan Drive-in is one of Blue Ridge's famous attractions as only one of a handful left in the USA. Families enjoy setting up picnics and watching movies all year round. For the men, cigar lounges in Blue Ridge and nearby Ellijay offer a reprieve from all the boutique shopping the ladies will be doing. 

For the adventurers in your group, check off unique experiences like driving a tank at Tank Town USA, exploring Project Chimps Sanctuary, or riding the Blue Ridge Scenic Railway from Blue Ridge, GA to nearby McCaysville, GA/Copperhill, TN. 

At the end of a fun-filled day, our luxury cabins in Blue Ridge, GA will be waiting to welcome you home for an evening spent in the game room, soaking in the hot tub, or sinking into your pillowtop mattress.

Visit Blue Ridge and experience all the amazing attractions that are offered for your entertainment and enjoyment!

terms.name: Blue Ridge Things To Do
terms.description:
Blue Ridge, Georgia is located in Fannin County, the Gateway to the Mountains. Once you enter this beautiful area surrounded by national forests and the North Georgia Mountains, you suddenly realize that relaxation and renewal, exhilaration and excitement can be yours. Whether you celebrate the moments of your life in one of our luxury vacation rentals or experience the beauty of Blue Ridge, you will be creating lasting memories.

Things To Do in Blue Ridge GA

With so many things to do and see in the North GA Mountains, you will discover the untarnished beauty of Blue Ridge, GA that will keep you coming back. Be invigorated by the fresh mountain air while exploring the many hiking trails in the Blue Ridge Mountains including the Benton-MacKaye Trail. Encounter peaceful waterfalls that are simply stunning. Be sure to check out Springer Mountain, which is the Southern terminus of the Appalachian Trail. 

Connect with nature while horseback riding and exploring different trails through the Chattahoochee National Forest. 

Exhilarating outdoor activities worth experiencing are whitewater rafting on the mighty Ocoee River. If you'd like a slower-paced river activity, tubing the Toccoa River through the mountains is a great way to savor the outdoors. 

Fannin County is known as the Trout Capital of Georgia, so be sure to cast a line in the Toccoa River for some rainbow trout beauties. Lake Blue Ridge is fun to fish for a more varied assortment. Trout fishing in Blue Ridge is really exciting with a guide, and we recommend Toccoa River Outfitters or North GA Trout Fishing. 

Family Friendly Activities in Blue Ridge

One of the many fun things to do with the kids in Blue Ridge is zip lining through a treetop canopy. Imagine the thrill of soaring through the trees! 

Take a ride on the Blue Ridge Scenic Railway as it winds its way along the Toccoa River to the mountain towns of McCaysville, GA/Copperhill, TN. Enjoy a great photo opportunity as you stand in two states at one time. While waiting for the train ride back to Blue Ridge, explore all the unique shops, boutiques, and restaurants along the river.

In the Aska Adventure Area along the Toccoa River, you will find a couple of gem mining venues that are great fun for kids at the Lilly Pad Village and Aska Mining Company. 

Take a stroll through Downtown Blue Ridge and discover 2nd Story Entertainment which is a 18-hole miniature golf course running through an 111-year old hotel. Further down Main Street is Vertigo Pinball featuring pinballs dating back to the 1990s. 

Explore Mercier Orchards which was established in 1943. During season, it's fun to pick strawberries, blueberries, and apples along the rolling hills. Stock up on goodies from the market, and check out the kids section offering unique toys and old-fashioned candy. 

There is a lot of history in the Blue Ridge area and history buffs will enjoy exploring The Baugh House in Downtown Blue Ridge. You will find local historical exhibits including textiles & stage coach memorabilia in an 1890 brick house. Other houses worth exploring are the Tabor House and Civil War Museum along with the Chief Vann House Historic Site. 

Depending on the time of year, Blue Ridge offers many festivals during the year and throughout the holidays. From the popular Arts in the Park every spring and fall to exciting 4th of July parades and fireworks, there is so much fun for young and old.

Nightlife in Blue Ridge, GA

Besides thrilling outdoor adventures, there are many Blue Ridge GA activities from art galleries, great foodie restaurants to unique boutiques and theaters. Enjoy the wineries and breweries in the area, from Bear Claw Vineyards and Roo Mountain Vineyards to Angry Hops Brewing and Grumpy Old Men. Enjoy unique bar experiences at Whiskey & Water and Hook & Eye.

terms.name: Breweries & Wineries
terms.description: Eat and drink your way through Blue Ridge, GA and the North Georgia mountains ~ Blue Ridge has become one of the most trendy towns in the North GA mountains offering cool breweries and excellent wineries ~ scenic and atmospheric places to celebrate the moments of your lives with the friends and loved ones.

terms.name: Concierge
terms.description:
Cabin Rentals of Georgia's Concierge Service is available to help make your Blue Ridge mountain vacation in our luxury cabin rentals as relaxing and stress-free as possible.

Our staff is available to give advice, make recommendations or offer any other assistance that you may need. We pride ourselves on being the authority on everything Blue Ridge, so just ask! We are happy to share our recommendations from restaurants, personal chefs, activities, wineries and breweries, and everything in between.

We live local and look forward to sharing our experiences and recommendations with you!

terms.name: Day Trips
terms.description:
When you come to Blue Ridge, GA you may not want to leave your cabin! But if you do, there are some awesome day trips that are easy to get to from Blue Ridge.

City Day Trips

A quick trip on interstate highway south to Atlanta is only 1.5 hours away, where families can enjoy the Georgia Aquarium, Stone Mountain, Six Flags, Ponce City Market, Fox Theater, the Fernbank Museum, the High Museum - the list goes on.

Chattanooga is also 1.5 hours away, but the drive is breathtakingly scenic as you drive through the Ocoee Gorge along the Ocoee River where the 1996 Summer Olympics were held. Experience Rock City, Ruby Falls, Lookout Mountain, the Tennessee Aquarium, the Chattanooga Choo Choo Museum, Creative Discovery Museum, Walnut Street Bridge, plus all the cool shopping and foodie restaurants. 

Exploring other day trips to Helen, GA for the Oktoberfest is a festive time, or Dahlonega, GA at Christmastime is very special and nostalgic. For shopping enthusiasts, a trip to Dawsonville, GA and the Georgia Premium Outlets is always a good time. 

Outdoor Adventure Day Trips

Spend a day at Lake Lanier Islands just 80 miles away, or experience the wild Nantahala Gorge in NC just 64 miles away for some exhilarating whitewater rafting in the Smoky Mountains. 

But at the end of the day, nothing beats coming home to your luxury Blue Ridge cabin and views that will take your breath away and melt the cares of the world into oblivion. Come experience Blue Ridge and all that surrounds it.

terms.name: Family Fun
terms.description:
"We didn't realize we were making memories...we just knew we were having fun!"

Blue Ridge, GA is a special place where families come together and strengthen the ties that bind. Blue Ridge was made for families with so many fun things to do with kids ~ whether enjoying outdoor activities like tubing and kayaking the Toccoa River, or boating on Lake Blue Ridge, or hiking the North GA Mountains on a geocache hunt, or ziplining, horseback riding - or enjoying the fun hang out spots in Downtown Blue Ridge. There's Vertigo Pinball, 2nd Story Entertainment, Mountain Man Comics, Deaf Man Vinyl, Huck's General Store, and even a skate park for big kids and a playground for little kids. 

No matter the season in these North GA mountains, there is always some adventure to explore, some pasttime to revisit, some fun to be had, some memory to create. Whether young or old, inside or outside, Blue Ridge offers so many fun things to do!

terms.name: Festivals & Events
terms.description: Blue Ridge is known for its picturesque landscapes, vibrant culture, and rich history. Nestled amidst the majestic Blue Ridge Mountains, this area is home to several captivating festivals that celebrate its natural beauty, heritage, and artistic talents. Each festival offers a unique experience and provides an opportunity to celebrate the region's art, music, culture, nature, and community. Whether you're a local resident or a curious traveler, attending these festivals is a wonderful way to immerse yourself in the vibrant spirit of Blue Ridge!

terms.name: Outdoor Adventure
terms.description:
If you’re looking for outdoor activities and adventure, Blue Ridge, Georgia has everything you could possibly consider.

Blue Ridge is near the Southern Terminus of the Appalachian Trail in the North GA Mountains, so hiking is the first to mention; Waterfalls surround Blue Ridge at Amicalola Falls State Park, Fall Branch Falls, Sea Creek Falls, Long Creek Falls, and Desoto Falls being the top five in the area.

With our mountain rivers and lakes, water-sports and activities like kayaking, canoeing, tubing, fly fishing, and boating are very popular. The best outfitters who will provide all you need on the Toccoa River is North GA Trout Fishing, who not only have the gear you need but also have exclusive and guided river trips.

Fishing Lake Blue Ridge provides opportunities for many kinds of fish. Check out how to fish Lake Blue Ridge

Other outdoor activities include mountain biking, horseback riding, apple picking, geocaching, camping, vineyard hopping and many, many more.

Let us help you plan your next vacation getaway to rediscover your love of outdoors in the beautiful Blue Ridge mountains!

terms.name: Restaurants
terms.description:
A key component of any vacation is dining, and Blue Ridge, GA offers a range of restaurant options! Regardless of your particular cravings, Blue Ridge has something for you! Whether you are in search of a romantic, fine-dining experience, a family-friendly pizzeria, or some good ol' fashioned Southern dishes, you will find something to please every palate in your group.

For the couples, visit The Pasta Market, Whiskey and Water, or Ferraro's for a sophisticated night out. When the kids are craving pizza after a long day exploring, Cucinella's Pizzeria or Mystic Mountain Pizza will satisfy those desires. Finally, for those who are in search of a more casual ambience, Burra Burra on the River, Fightingtown Tavern, and Cucina Rustica are the perfect options for when cooking seems too burdensome for your North Georgia Mountain getaway.

terms.name: Shopping
terms.description: Full of boutique shops, Blue Ridge offers a variety of shopping options during your North Georgia getaway! From homemade olive oils to old-fashioned candy or from home decor to unique fashion, these quaint stores hold something for everyone. Check out a few of our favorites!

terms.name: Spas & Wellness
terms.description: Immerse yourself in a world of tranquility as you escape the stresses of everyday life and embark on a journey of relaxation. From luxurious treatments to serene surroundings, these spas offer a sanctuary where your mind, body, and spirit can find perfect harmony. Let the skilled hands of expert therapists melt away your tensions with therapeutic massages, and experience blissful serenity as you indulge in revitalizing facials and rejuvenating body treatments. Blue Ridge's spas are the ultimate destination for those seeking a moment of bliss in a truly enchanting setting.

terms.name: Trip Itineraries
terms.description: How to plan a trip to Blue Ridge GA! Let us provide ready-made themed-itineraries to help enhance your experience and save time so that all you have to do is check into your cabin and then go explore! Romantic Getaways, Girls Trip, Guys Weekend, Family-Fun, Outdoor Adventurer, Local Expertise, Seasonal Itineraries, and other curated itineraries are sure to spark some fun ideas for things to do in the beautiful mountains of Blue Ridge, GA. We make planning a cabin trip to the Georgia Blue Ridge Mountains seamless and easy!

terms.name: Blue Ridge Cabins
terms.description:
The Blue Ridge Mountains of North Georgia are calling and you can enjoy an easy 90-minute trip from Atlanta, GA to Blue Ridge, GA.  When you need to get away from the hustle and bustle of city living, you can easily escape to the mountains and feel as though you have traveled hundreds of miles to a mountain resort town. 

Luxury Cabin Rentals in Blue Ridge, Georgia

Whether you seek a secluded mountain retreat, a riverfront getaway, or a lake view cabins, our handpicked cabins offer something for every traveler.

Destress, recharge, and reconnect with your loved ones in our beautiful selection of Blue Ridge cabin rentals. Create memories around a fire pit with s'mores, soak your cares away in a hot tub overlooking the mountains, wrap yourself up in a cozy throw in front of the fireplace, and enjoy alfresco dining as the sun sets on a perfect day.

Explore Our Blue Ridge Cabin Collection

Browse through our boutique collection of unique cabin rentals. Each luxury cabin rental has been selected for its special amenities offering hot tubs with views, fun-filled game rooms, fire pits by the river, river access for fishing, and so much more.

We specialize in large group cabin rentals for family reunions and corporate retreats with a cluster of large cabins along the Toccoa River. Call us at (706) 432-2140 and let us help you plan your perfect Blue Ridge Mountain getaway!

terms.name: Blue Ridge Experience
terms.description:
Things to Do in Blue Ridge, GA 

Experience Blue Ridge where the activities in Blue Ridge are so plentiful that you might just have to make a return trip to the North Georgia Mountains! Whether you love adventure or a slower pace, Blue Ridge has it all — from whitewater rafting, tubing, fishing, hiking waterfalls to visiting wineries, unique shopping, and orchards. Beautiful lush forests, colorful seasonal foliage, sparkling blue lake waters, rushing rivers, and a peaceful way of life ~ these things embody the magical experience of Blue Ridge, GA.

About Blue Ridge, GA

terms.name: Blue Ridge Memories
terms.description:
Experiencing Blue Ridge in our luxury Blue Ridge cabins creates a backdrop and setting for creating memorable moments. 

Blue Ridge Cabins for Families

For families, Cabin Rentals of Georgia offers an idyllic locale where families add value to their lives one memory-filled day at a time. 

Romantic Cabins in Blue Ridge GA

For couples, our luxury cabin rentals' enchanting setting create the perfect backdrop for a romantic escape where passions are ignited into flames of love. 

Corporate Retreats in the North Georgia Mountains

When it comes to business, our executive mountain homes invigorate group agendas and provides the perfect environment for team building activities along the Toccoa River or in the Chattahoochee National Forest. 

To create a memory, to find something new, to start a future, to rediscover the past, to do nothing at all, to cast a fly, to explore the wilderness, to spark a flame...everyone comes to Blue Ridge for a reason.

Let Cabin Rentals of Georgia help you create memories that will be in your heart forever and draw you back again and again.

terms.name:
Expert Revenue
Management
terms.description: With over 20 years of hospitality experience in revenue management, we maximize the rental revenue of our homeowners year after year. We constantly analyze our rental rates to ensure that we are keeping up with supply and demand. In addition, our unique pricing models generate thousands more in rental income when compared to other pricing strategies.

terms.name:
Powerful Property
Marketing
terms.description: Your home's exposure across all major marketing channels will be enhanced by our marketing and sales strategy. Third-party booking sites, professional photography, and engaging copywriting all contribute to our cabins' competitive advantage in online searches, along with monthly email blasts, robust social media engagement, and PPC campaigns which increase bookings.

terms.name:
Direct Booking
Strength
terms.description: Enjoying a strong SEO presence on Google and other top engines, over 70% of our reservations are from direct bookings. We have a very large repeat-guest ratio due to excellent stays, email blasts, and Loyalty Reward Points.

terms.name:
Guest
Screening
terms.description: Our enhanced vetting services head off potential problems before they occur as well as realizing potential lost income. We keep an accurate guest count (as well as pet information) from the time of booking to the time of arrival and beyond. We continue this screening with a phone call on day of arrival as well as through our Guest Communications app.

terms.name:
Professional House
Keeping
terms.description: We personally train our Housekeepers on staff to do a thorough and detailed cleaning of your cabin before each arrival. Within our vacation rental software, we implement our own custom check systems and detailed checklists. The system allows for scheduling and communication with our cleaning staff. This ensures they do an exceptional job, resulting in high reviews for our cleanliness.

terms.name:
Maintenance
Technicians
terms.description: Within our vacation rental software we use an extensive checklist making sure our in-house maintenance team walks through your home periodically to ensure that everything is in working order.

terms.name:
Quality
Inspections
terms.description: Our inspection process delivers a high standard of care. Your home is inspected after each departure to ensure everything is in order. We inspect it again after the Housekeeper cleans, and we inspect again upon guests’ arrival to make sure everything is perfect for their arrival.

terms.name:
VIP Experience
App
terms.description: All guests are given a direct line of communication with our staff during their stay. Guests can check in and out, use our concierge services, access our destination guide, and even watch instructional videos on the operation of the home’s TVs, gas fireplaces, and more.

terms.name:
Exceeding
Expectations
terms.description: While providing excellent customer service through our VIP app along with an informative Destination Guide, we ensure that each guest’s experience is elevated while staying in your home. They know to expect a flawlessly clean and well-maintained home along with luxury amenities. Our concierge services provide guests with day itineraries, fishing trips, grocery shopping and more.

terms.name:
Smart-Home
Technology
terms.description: Our homes are equipped with a directory system that serves as a direct line of communication between our guests and our staff. Our guests can access the directory and watch instructional videos on how to operate the home’s gas fireplaces, TV remotes, and more. Most homes are equipped with keyless door locks and thermostat sensors.

terms.name:
Tax
Reporting
terms.description: We facilitate the process of collecting and paying local lodging and occupancy taxes for the city, county, and state. Our accounting team prepares all sales tax payments and reports for you every month.

terms.name:
Private Client
Portal Access
terms.description: Enjoy transparent updates through your private portal access giving you a 360º view of your home’s details.

terms.name:
Contracts and
Commission Rates
terms.description: Honest transparency is essential to a successful partnership, which is why we consider each contract and commission rates individually. It is not our policy to win your business with a low teaser rate and then try to recoup our expenses with hidden fees. Maintaining trust through communication is key.
